proven.claim: Proven: "--issues" is documented in help (line 554) and consumed by
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 554
; Proven: "--issues" is documented in help (line 554) and consumed by
; args.includes("--issues") in runAnalyze, which gates the fileIssues() call.
(declare-const issues_documented Int)
(declare-const issues_consumed Int)
(assert (= issues_documented 1))
; args.includes("--issues") || dryRun → fileIssues(...) in runAnalyze
(assert (= issues_consumed 1))
(assert (not (= issues_documented issues_consumed)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — --issues is documented and gates fileIssues()
